title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXCV. Natural History.
content:
The cuckoo's a fine bird,
            He sings as he flies;
        He brings us good tidings,
            He tells us no lies.

        He sucks little birds' eggs,
            To make his voice clear;
        And when he sings "cuckoo!"
            The summer is near.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXCV. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
